mode.title: Scraping Mode
mode.description: Select the type of data you want to extract.

usernames.title: Usernames / Accounts
usernames.description: List of usernames, @mentions or links to scrape.

postUrls.title: Specific Post URLs
postUrls.description: Direct links to posts for detailed scraping or comments.

limit.title: Limit Posts
limit.description: Maximum number of posts to scrape per account.

maxComments.title: Max Comments per Post
maxComments.description: Number of comments to fetch per post (0 to skip).

includeReplies.title: Include Comment Replies
includeReplies.description: Fetch all replies (child comments) for each extracted comment.

newerThan.title: Newer Than (Date)
newerThan.description: Filter: Only posts AFTER this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

olderThan.title: Older Than (Date)
olderThan.description: Filter: Only posts BEFORE this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

offset.title: Offset (Pagination)
offset.description: Skip N items from the start.

sortDirection.title: Sort Direction
sortDirection.description: Result sorting in the output dataset.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies are enforced by default.
